title: Curse of the Yeeters
description: TNT Yeeters have returned from the dead! And they're cursed!
body:
## Curse of the Yeeters v2 - singleplayer and multiplayer

This mod lets you craft a **Yeeter Maker**, which is basically an enchanted skull full of bad ideas.   
   
![Curse of the Yeeters banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b901e490cdc54d6165358864e2cb74c11abae44.jpeg)
     
Hold a Yeeter Maker in the mainhand and sneak to **summon a Yeeter**, which appears in front of you and yeets TNT* in the direction you're facing.    
<small>*May contain chicken parts</small>   
    
**This is a cursed mod**. Yeeters were dead, and there's a price to pay for bringing back the dead.    

**Cursed Yeeters are hugely, indiscriminately destructive**. They are also one of the least accurate 'weapons' you will ever use. Consequently, _an attempt to kill a spider can easily end up destroying an entire village_.    

If that's some kind of negative for you, this may not be your mod.    
     
![Destroyed village, cursed yeeter aftermath](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae6a97fa0d2d8896e2d88dc9460bfb8da38c3630.jpeg)   
_Sleep well my friend, your village is saved!_    

## Craft and /give    

The ingredients are TNT, grindstone, and _chicken part_. They can be placed anywhere in the crafting grid.   

![Cursed yeeter crafting ingredients, table view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62130979028abd64cd76ce6fa577b22ce6b25e5b.gif)
   
Not feeling crafty? Enter this in chat:   
**/give @s stick[custom_name={"text":"Yeeter Maker"}] 64**

## YouTube Yeeter demo

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/n4S29gkJXSM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>   
   
_A Cursed Yeeter, yeeting_
    
## Trivia    

### Mod title    
The full official title of this mod is _Day of the Dawn of the Night of the Curse of the Yeeters_.   
    
### Cursed Yeeter origins timeline    
**August 2019**   
Reddit user u/6ranolabar [releases the first TNT Yeeter into the wild](https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/cq0mgn/i_made_a_tnt_yeeter/).  
It reproduces rapidly and spreads throughout the Minecraft community.   
**November 2020**   
u/6ranolabar suddenly announces [The Death of the Yeeters](https://www.reddit.com/r/deadmeme/comments/k1twit/i_think_this_one_is_pretty_ded/), and _is never heard from again_.   
**April 2026**   
A fun little Minecraft nostalgia project featuring old-school Yeeters keeps crashing the server.   
Things gets weird when _Yeeters invade my dreams_ and tell me to add chicken parts to the recipe.   
Sure enough, that does seem to fix it... kind of...
